generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Entity [
    base:desc "Centralized physical twin entity hosting automotive-specific functionalities including point cloud clustering and actuation for a 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment SystemUnderStudy
    DTDFVocab:base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis responsible for steering and speed control via motor and servo actuators for the autonomous vehicle"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer executing ACC logic with motor voltage commands to Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor capturing real-time ego vehicle speed data for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring real-time steering angle for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing object detection and tracking for environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera capturing environmental context for autonomous vehicle perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraPointCloudData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Streams
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Object tracks with position/velocity estimates generated via LiDAR/depth camera processing"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environment mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera for environmental context"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

// C5: Data Processing Entities
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity in Physical Twin Entity performing point cloud clustering and sensor fusion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClustering, KalmanFiltering
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity serializing processed data for transmission via Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WiFiCommunication
]

// C6: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-entity communication and component integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for programming NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlLogic
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for application development and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, ReportGenerationFE
]

instance CppROS2Lifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ ROS2 node lifecycle management for robust component operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, ACCControlLogic
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for control model implementation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlLogic
]

instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering in LiDAR data processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance KalmanFiltering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering for object tracking in sensor data processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication protocol for inter-entity data transfer with latency ≤100ms"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance OPCUA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA (IEC 62541) as potential data translation protocol (not fully utilized)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

// C7: Models/Data
instance Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the autonomous vehicle for digital twin rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationFE
]

instance Environment3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the surrounding environment for digital twin simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationFE
]

instance ObjectTrackDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data model containing object tracks with position/velocity estimates from LiDAR and depth camera processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control model implementing Adaptive Cruise Control logic per ISO 15622 for performance class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogic
]

instance HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical ego vehicle state and object track data for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationFE
]

instance RealTimeDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temporary data storage for current ego vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationFE, RemoteManagementService
]

// C8: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected objects, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC control logic from on-board ECUs to cloud-based Digital Twin Entity, reducing resource constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicOptimizationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control service enabling enable/disable, speed adjustment, and emergency braking commands via Control Panel FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

// C9: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected objects, and projected driving path"
]

instance ControlLogicOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic offloading of ACC control logic to cloud-based Digital Twin Entity for performance optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual remote control commands (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking) sent to physical vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Entity [
    base:desc "Centralized cloud-based Digital Twin Entity receiving processed data from Physical Twin Entity for visualization and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalTwinEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:base:contains 3DVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE, ReportGenerationFE
]

// C13: User Interface Components
instance 3DVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Functional Entity providing real-time 3D visualization of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:fromData Vehicle3DCADModel, Environment3DCADModel, ObjectTrackDataModel, RealTimeDataStorage
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Control Panel Functional Entity enabling remote management of ACC via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeDataStorage
]

instance ReportGenerationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Reporting Functional Entity generating human-readable time-series reports from historical data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalDataStorage
]

// C14: ACC Control Logic
instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implemented per ISO 15622 for performance class I, executed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
]

// Additional Environment and SystemUnderStudy instances
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "A 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle designed for adaptive cruise control (ACC) testing"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    DTDFVocab:base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    DTDFVocab:base:contains DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes commands from the DT to the physical twin: **remote enable/disable of ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking**. These commands are transmitted via Wi-Fi to the Digital Twin Entity, processed by the **Controlling FE**, and forwarded to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation. The system adheres to ISO 15622 for ACC control logic, with actuation executed via motor voltage commands to the speed controller."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales**, with synchronization between the physical and virtual twins constrained to ≤100ms end-to-end latency for critical control signals. Clock synchronization is achieved with an accuracy of ≤100ms across distributed devices to ensure event ordering and data integrity. The system adheres to 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity) with clear ownership boundaries: **Physical Twin Entity** handles sensor data processing and actuation; **Digital Twin Entity** manages data collection, storage, and control logic; **User Entity** provides visualization and remote management interfaces. The **Data Translation FE** acts as a cross-system intermediary, serializing and aligning data formats between entities. The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing the Physical Twin Entity and splitting the User Interface FE into visualization and control components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation (e.g., ACC algorithm validation) during vehicle design.
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Enabled retrofitting of the autonomous vehicle (physical twin) with autonomy components (e.g., LiDAR, Jetson Orin Nano).
  - **Operation Phase**: Deployed for real-time monitoring, remote management, and optimization of ACC during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: **1) Real-time data validation** (e.g., LiDAR/depth camera synchronization); **2) Latency constraints** (≤100ms for critical control signals); **3) Clock synchronization** (≤100ms accuracy); **4) Verification/Validation (V/V)** via ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic; **5) Uncertainty handling** in object tracking (Kalman filter for state estimation); **6) Safety-critical design** (no remote execution of unsafe operations on the physical twin). The DT’s models are validated against real-world autonomous vehicle behavior during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs **Wi-Fi communication** for inter-entity data transfer (Physical Twin Entity ↔ Digital Twin Entity) and **ROS2 middleware** for intra-entity communication. Data serialization and alignment are handled by the **Data Translation FE**, ensuring compatibility between ROS2 message types. The system adheres to **3GPP 22.185** for V2V communication latency requirements (<100ms)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity is deployed on external hardware (different from the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano), while the Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s autonomy hardware (Jetson Orin Nano, LiDAR, etc.). The Digital Twin is hosted on a cloud/server infrastructure for data storage and processing."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates with external systems indirectly via:
  - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Requirements**: Adheres to 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency (≤ 100 ms), though explicit V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) integration is not detailed in the case study."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is not explicitly detailed in the documents. The Physical Twin stores data externally (SQL databases), but no specific privacy standards (e.g., encryption protocols) are mentioned for raw sensor data transmission."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: **1) ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework)** for reference architecture (entity-based structure); **2) ISO 15622 (Automotive ADAS—Adaptive Cruise Control)** for ACC control logic; **3) 3GPP 22.185 (Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication)** for latency requirements; **4) ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)** for middleware; **5) IEC 62541 (OPC UA)** as a potential implementation for data translation FEs. The Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 by incorporating automotive-specific functionalities."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Latency and Synchronization**: ≤ 100 ms end-to-end latency and clock synchronization (±100 ms) ensure real-time safety-critical operations.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT is designed as a Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop (remote management via Control Panel FE).
  - **Safety-Critical Design**: Compliance with ISO 15622 (ACC performance class I) and adherence to safety-critical principles (e.g., Kalman filtering for object tracking). Wi-Fi communication is assumed to use standard encryption protocols (not explicitly detailed)."
]
